nasb.text: Seeing this, the disciples were amazed and asked, “How did the fig tree wither all at once?”

esv.text: When the disciples saw it, they marveled, saying, “How did the fig tree wither at once?”

cnv.text: 門徒看見了，十分驚奇，說：“這棵無花果樹是怎樣立刻枯萎的呢？”

ccb.text: 门徒见了就惊奇地问：“这棵树怎么一下子枯萎了？”

csbs.text: 门徒们看见了，感到惊奇，说：“这棵无花果树怎么立刻枯萎了呢？”
